recommended_adjustment: Age, sex, race/ethnicity, income, education, total energy intake, urinary creatinine, NHANES cycle
variables_in_project: RIDAGEYR, RIAGENDR, RIDRETH3, INDFMPIR, DMDEDUC2, DR1TKCAL, ln_URXUCR, cycle
reason: Controls major demographic, socioeconomic, dietary, urinary dilution, and temporal confounding.

recommended_adjustment: Main model plus smoking, alcohol, and physical activity where available
variables_in_project: SMQ variables, ALQ variables, PAQ variables
reason: Tests whether lifestyle factors explain the exposure-outcome association.

recommended_adjustment: Main model plus hsCRP, WBC/NLR, GGT/ALT, eGFR, or FLI separately
variables_in_project: ln_hsCRP, ln_WBC, ln_NLR, ln_GGT, ln_ALT, eGFR_2021, FLI
reason: Exploratory pathway-consistency analysis, not formal mediation.

recommended_adjustment: Do not adjust for BMI when obesity/adiposity may be on pathway to HOMA-IR unless explicitly treated as sensitivity analysis
reason: BMI may be a mediator or collider depending on the causal question.

recommended_adjustment: Do not adjust for diagnosed diabetes or medication in primary model unless using sensitivity analysis
reason: Diagnosis and treatment may be downstream of metabolic status and can induce bias.
